---
description: Review code changes for bugs, convention violations, and architecture issues
---

Review my recent code changes using the @code-reviewer agent.

Focus on:
1. Convention compliance against `docs/CONVENTIONS.md` and `.github/instructions/`
2. Architecture alignment with `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
3. Bugs, edge cases, and security issues
4. Upstream/downstream breakage from changed exports or types

Output a structured report with Critical / Important / Minor severity levels.
Include file paths and line numbers for every finding.
